mano_cua.result_summary: persist+direction='up'定位正确。DevTools测量：菜单底部(64.14px)≈按钮顶部(64.00px)，gap=-0.14px（紧贴）。persist vs 无persist定位数据完全一致（top/bottom/height/gap/transform全相同），persist不影响Popper定位。菜单确实向上弹出（top-start placement），底部边缘紧贴按钮顶部，不是左上角对齐的错误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Persist attribute has no effect on positioning. Menu bottom aligns correctly to button top with gap -0.14px in both cases.
